name: agentour-compiler
description: Create, update or reconstruct Agentour Agents with adaptive discovery, durable checkpoints, validation, fidelity tests and publishing.

interface.shortDescription: Adaptive Agent creation, updates, recovery and migration.
interface.longDescription: Create, update or reconstruct Agentour Packages with a mature-user idea dump, targeted one-question follow-ups, platform-backed resumable checkpoints, model discovery, fidelity validation and private or public publishing.
defaultPrompt: 帮我创建并上传一个 Agentour Agent。每轮只问我一个问题，其余流程你自动完成。
把当前项目里的 Agent 高还原度转换并上传到 Agentour。每轮只让我做一个选择。
检查并修好当前 Agentour Agent，直到达到可发布状态。
